title: cynosurus sesleria
intro: Cynosurus sesleria, also known as Sesleria, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as the ability to stimulate the immune system. The health benefits of Sesleria include its ability to help with respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of skin conditions and wounds. Sesleria can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also sometimes used as a topical application for skin conditions.
